use_cases: Display categorical data comparisons in a circular/radial layout for visual impact
Show percentage-based metrics with customizable gradient bar colors and inner radius
Enable interactive data exploration with sorting and rotation controls
Visualize business metrics across multiple categories in a space-efficient format
Create engaging data dashboards with animated radial chart presentations
ai_summary: A radial bar chart component from Airbnb that renders categorical data in a circular visualization format using visx primitives. Features customizable gradient fills, rotation controls, and sorting options for interactive data exploration. Adapts to any width/height dimensions with configurable margins and inner radius ratios for flexible layout integration.
